info.name: Addiction Recovery API
info.description: RESTful API for the Addiction Recovery Platform. This collection covers authentication, user management, support groups, therapy sessions, payments, and recommendations.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints for user registration, login, and session management

request.description: Register a new user with addiction profile information. Returns authentication token upon successful registration.

response.name: Success - User Registered
response.description: User successfully registered with addiction profile

response.name: Validation Error - Missing Required Fields
response.description: Validation failed due to missing required fields

response.name: Validation Error - Duplicate Mobile

request.description: Verify user's phone number with OTP code sent during registration.

response.name: Validation Error - Invalid OTP

request.description: Authenticate user with mobile number and password. Returns Bearer token for subsequent requests.

response.name: Success - Logged In
Unauthorized - Invalid Credentials
response.description: Login failed due to invalid credentials

response.name: Validation Error - Missing Fields
response.description: Validation failed due to missing required fields

request.description: Logout the current user and invalidate the token.
Get the currently authenticated user's profile with addiction profile and group information.

response.name: Success - User Profile

item.name: Users
item.description: User management endpoints - CRUD operations for user accounts

request.description: Get a paginated list of all users. Requires authentication.
Get details of a specific user by ID.

response.name: Not Found - User Does Not Exist
response.description: User with specified ID not found

request.description: Update an existing user's profile information.

response.name: Validation Error - Invalid Data
response.description: Validation failed for invalid language code

request.description: Soft delete a user account.

response.name: Not Found - User Does Not Exist

item.name: Sessions
item.description: Therapy session management - view, join, leave, start, and end therapy sessions

request.description: Get upcoming sessions for the user's group. Returns sessions scheduled at or after the current time.

exec: pm.test('Response contains session with relationships', function() {

request.description: Get details of a specific session including instructor and group information.

response.name: Success - Session Details
Not Found - Session Does Not Exist
response.description: Session with specified ID not found

request.description: Join an active therapy session. Records attendance with join timestamp.

response.name: Success - Joined Session
Error - Session Not Active
response.description: Session is not in an active state

response.name: Error - Already Joined
response.description: User already has attendance record for this session

request.description: Leave an active therapy session. Records leave timestamp in attendance.

response.name: Error - Not In Session
response.description: No attendance record found for user in this session

request.description: Start a scheduled session. Only available to instructors and admins. Changes session status to 'live'.

response.name: Forbidden - Not Instructor
response.description: Only instructors and admins can start sessions

request.description: End an active session. Only available to instructors and admins. Changes session status to 'completed'.

response.name: Error - Session Not Started
response.description: Session must be in 'live' status to end

item.name: Groups
item.description: Support group management - view user's assigned group

request.description: Get the user's assigned support group with instructor and member details.

response.name: Success - My Group
Not Found - No Group Assigned
response.description: User is not assigned to any group

item.name: Payments
item.description: Payment management - initiate payments, view history, and handle webhooks

request.description: Initiate payment for a session. Creates a pending payment record and returns gateway-specific payment data.

response.name: Success - Payment Initiated
Error - Session Not Billable
response.description: Session is free or already paid

request.description: Get paginated payment history for the authenticated user.
Receive payment gateway webhook notifications. Supports Paymob and Fawry gateways. Validates HMAC signature before processing.

item.name: Lookups
item.description: Lookup data - retrieve reference data like substances, education levels, and treatment types

exec: pm.test('Response contains categories with substances', function() {

request.description: Get all active substance categories with their associated substances. Used during registration for addiction profile.

response.name: Success - Substances List

request.description: Get lookup values by type. Common types: addiction_duration, education_level, treatment_type.

response.name: Success - Lookup Values
response.body:
{
    "custom_code": 200,
    "status": true,
    "message": "Data retrieved successfully",
    "body": {
        "values": [
            {
                "id": 1,
                "lookup_type_id": 1,
                "value_key": "less_than_1_year",
                "label_ar": "أقل من سنة",
                "label_en": "Less than 1 year",
                "sort_order": 1,
                "is_active": true
            },
            {
                "id": 2,
                "lookup_type_id": 1,
                "value_key": "1_to_5_years",
                "label_ar": "من 1 إلى 5 سنوات",
                "label_en": "1 to 5 years",
                "sort_order": 2,
                "is_active": true
            },
            {
                "id": 3,
                "lookup_type_id": 1,
                "value_key": "more_than_5_years",
                "label_ar": "أكثر من 5 سنوات",
                "label_en": "More than 5 years",
                "sort_order": 3,
                "is_active": true
            }
        ]
    },
    "info": "from response action"
}

response.name: Not Found - Invalid Lookup Type
response.description: Lookup type with specified key not found

item.name: Recommendations
item.description: Get personalized recommendations for treatment centers, support groups, or other resources

request.description: Get personalized recommendations. Without query param, returns general recommendations. With after_session, returns session-specific recommendations.

response.name: Success - General Recommendations
response.body:
{
    "custom_code": 200,
    "status": true,
    "message": "Data retrieved successfully",
    "body": {
        "recommendations": [
            {
                "id": 1,
                "substance_category_id": null,
                "type": "support_group",
                "name_ar": "مجموعة دعم أصدقاء",
                "name_en": "Friends Support Group",
                "contact_info": "support@example.com",
                "latitude": 30.0444,
                "longitude": 31.2357,
                "is_active": true
            },
            {
                "id": 2,
                "substance_category_id": 1,
                "type": "treatment_center",
                "name_ar": "مركز علاج الإدمان",
                "name_en": "Addiction Treatment Center",
                "contact_info": "+201234567890",
                "latitude": 30.0131,
                "longitude": 31.2089,
                "is_active": true
            }
        ]
    },
    "info": "from response action"
}

response.name: Success - Session-Specific Recommendations
